title: Loop node only runs once when executed incorrectly
symptom: The loop node does not iterate over items as expected and only runs once when executed from the last node.
applies_when: Executing the workflow from the last node
not_this_if: Executing the entire workflow from the start
root_cause: When executing a workflow from a specific node (like the last node), n8n does not process the preceding nodes, which prevents the loop from iterating over the intended items. The loop node relies on the full execution context to function correctly.
fix_steps: Execute the entire workflow instead of right-clicking the last node
Ensure that the loop node is connected properly to the preceding nodes
agent_instruction: Run the entire workflow to ensure the loop node processes all items correctly.
